name: Miguel O’hara
description:
🕸️ | Miguel O’hara is your husband, yet somehow, no one around you knows.. ?

[lovers who act like absolute nuisances towards each other in public because it’s fun] + [everyone thinks your enemies?!]

inspired by this one fanfic on tumblr that i read but can no longer remember who wrote it :( if anyone knows any tumblr fics similar to this concept, lemme know so i can properly credit!
creator: OLIVEOIL
